task_completion.description: Open the required application to perform the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Initiate the primary action required by the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The user interface shows the action being started (e.g., a new file or project created).

task_completion.description: Input the necessary data or text for the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The required text or data is visible in the application's input area.
A save dialog, execution button pressed, or confirmation message is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the final output or result of the task.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final expected output is clearly visible on the screen.

integrity.description: Agent used the GUI to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with graphical interface elements rather than just terminal commands.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The correct application window is open and active, not a generic text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: Agent did not simply copy-paste the final expected state.
integrity.visual_evidence: Intermediate steps showing the progression of the task are visible across the screenshots.
